'''fatumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabbeter|rabbeter]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-t-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabbeter|rabbeter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fatumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fætimith|fætimith]] || [[word:fætimij|fætimij]] || [[word:fætimish|fætimish]] || [[word:fætimi|fætimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fatutumuth|fatutumuth]] || [[word:fatutumuj|fatutumuj]] || [[word:fatutumush|fatutumush]] || [[word:fatutumu|fatutumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fatumuth|fatumuth]] || [[word:fatumuj|fatumuj]] || [[word:fatumush|fatumush]] || [[word:fatumu|fatumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fatufmuth|fatufmuth]] || [[word:fatufmuj|fatufmuj]] || [[word:fatufmush|fatufmush]] || [[word:fatufmuf|fatufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fatumuthu|fatumuthu]] || [[word:fatumuju|fatumuju]] || [[word:fatumushu|fatumushu]] || [[word:fatumuku|fatumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fatumuth|fatumuth]] || [[word:fatumuj|fatumuj]] || [[word:fatumush|fatumush]] || [[word:fatumu|fatumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fatumuthul|fatumuthul]] || [[word:fatumujul|fatumujul]] || [[word:fatumushul|fatumushul]] || [[word:fatumukul|fatumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fatumuthuthu|fatumuthuthu]] || [[word:fatumujuju|fatumujuju]] || [[word:fatumushushu|fatumushushu]] || [[word:fatumuku|fatumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fatumuthun|fatumuthun]] || [[word:fatumujun|fatumujun]] || [[word:fatumushun|fatumushun]] || [[word:fatumukun|fatumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fatumuthuoro|fatumuthuoro]] || [[word:fatumujuoro|fatumujuoro]] || [[word:fatumushuoro|fatumushuoro]] || [[word:fatumukuoro|fatumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
